MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Oct-02-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff Sircles Media, Inc.'s unopposed Motion to Admit Counsel Pro Hac Vice is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing, counsel Joshua Pagan may appear as counsel pro hac vice for Moving Party in this action.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
